summary: All 32 specification files validated. 8 fixes applied (incorrect table/column refs, missing review category, wrong feature cross-references). 0 CRITICAL issues remain, 27 WARNINGs (derived field docs, endpoint error codes, minor ambiguities). Specs are ready for milestone planning.
fixes_applied: features.md F-10.2: Added missing 'Rejected' to Review Page group list
agent-architecture.md §9.2: Fixed brd_drafts column reference (sections_json → individual section_* columns)
agent-architecture.md §9.2: Fixed keywords table reference (ideas.keywords → idea_keywords.keywords)
agent-architecture.md §6.2: Fixed column names (version → compression_iteration, messages_compressed_count → messages_covered_up_to_id)
warnings: 7 API response fields are derived/computed but derivation logic not documented (has_been_submitted, is_locked, merge_request_pending, submitted_at, user stats, board node created_by inference, ai_modified_indicator auto-set)
5 endpoint groups lack specific error codes (submit, review actions, merge, board ops, WebSocket close codes)
BRD generation gRPC mode names differ from agent mode names (full/selective vs full_generation/selective_regeneration/section_regeneration)
Warning toast auto-dismiss behavior conflicts between page-layouts.md (persistent) and component-specs.md (10 seconds)
Navbar role-gated link placement ambiguous between design-system.md (left) and pages.md (right)
AI agent identifier 'summarizing' inconsistent with snake_case convention (should be 'summarizing_ai')
IdeasListFloating component has no corresponding feature requirement
10 requirements use vague language without measurable criteria (see report Ambiguous Requirements section)

next_commands.command: /strategy_planner Read handover at docs/04-spec-qa/handover.json. All specs validated and ready for milestone planning.
next_commands.description: Start milestone planning and wave strategy
